description: Multi-channel notification system to keep parents and students informed about classes, assignments, grades, and important updates. Respects time zone preferences and allows customization of notification frequency and channels.

phases.name: Database Schema & Types
phases.description: Extend database schema to support multi-channel notifications, user preferences, and delivery tracking

subtasks.title: Create notification channel and status enums
subtasks.description: Add PostgreSQL enums for notification_channel (email, push, sms, in_app) and notification_status (pending, sent, delivered, failed, read)
subtasks.notes: Successfully created PostgreSQL enums migration file. Added notification_channel enum (email, push, sms, in_app) and notification_status enum (pending, sent, delivered, failed, read) following existing schema patterns.

subtasks.title: Create notification_preferences table
subtasks.description: Create table to store user preferences including enabled channels, digest frequency, quiet hours, and timezone
subtasks.notes:
Successfully created notification_preferences table migration. Added comprehensive user preferences including:
- Channel toggles (email, push, SMS, in-app)
- Digest frequency enum (instant, daily, weekly)
- Quiet hours with timezone support
- Granular notification type preferences (class reminders, grades, announcements, cancellations)
- Phone number with verification status
- Unsubscribe token system for CAN-SPAM compliance
- RLS policies for user data protection
- Automatic updated_at trigger
Follows established schema patterns with proper indexes, comments, and foreign key constraints.

subtasks.title: Create notification_queue table
subtasks.description: Create table for queuing notifications with scheduling, retry logic, and delivery tracking
subtasks.notes:
Successfully created notification_queue table migration with comprehensive features:
- Notification type enum (class_reminder, grade_update, announcement, cancellation, assignment_due, exam_reminder)
- Priority enum (low, normal, high, critical) for scheduling critical notifications first
- Complete queue fields: user_id, notification_type, channel, priority, title, body, data (JSONB)
- Scheduling support: scheduled_for timestamp for timezone-aware delivery
- Robust retry logic: retry_count, max_retries (default 3), last_attempted_at
- Comprehensive delivery tracking: sent_at, delivered_at, read_at, failed_at timestamps
- Error tracking: error_message field for debugging failed deliveries
- Digest batching: digest_batch_id and is_digest_aggregated for email digests
- External provider tracking: external_id for Resend/Twilio IDs
- Optimized indexes for common query patterns (pending notifications, failed retries, digest aggregation)
- Auto-timestamp triggers for sent_at, delivered_at, read_at, failed_at based on status changes
- RLS policies for user access and system operations
- Comprehensive comments for all fields and design decisions
Follows established migration patterns with proper DROP CASCADE, detailed comments, and robust indexing strategy.

subtasks.title: Create push_subscriptions table
subtasks.description: Create table to store web push subscription endpoints and keys per user/device
subtasks.notes: Successfully created push_subscriptions table migration following established patterns. Added comprehensive table structure with core push subscription fields (endpoint, p256dh, auth), device identification, status tracking, optimized indexes, RLS policies, and comprehensive comments. Table supports multiple devices per user with unique endpoint constraint.

subtasks.title: Update TypeScript database types
subtasks.description: Add TypeScript types for new tables and enums in database.ts
subtasks.notes: Successfully added TypeScript types for all notification system tables and enums in database.ts. Added 5 new enum types (NotificationChannel, NotificationStatus, DigestFrequency, NotificationType, NotificationPriority) and 3 new table type definitions (notification_preferences, notification_queue, push_subscriptions). Each table includes complete Row, Insert, and Update types following established patterns. Updated Database.Enums interface to include all new enum types.

subtasks.title: Create notification type definitions
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive TypeScript types for notification payloads, templates, and preferences
subtasks.notes:
Successfully created comprehensive TypeScript types for the notification system in src/types/notifications.ts. Added:
- Notification payload types for all 6 notification types (ClassReminderPayload, GradeUpdatePayload, AnnouncementPayload, CancellationPayload, AssignmentDuePayload, ExamReminderPayload)
- NotificationPayloadMap for type-safe payload handling
- CreateNotificationInput and CreateBatchNotificationInput for creating notifications
- Template types (NotificationTemplate, TemplateContext, RenderedTemplate)
- Preference management types (UpdateNotificationPreferencesInput, QuietHours, ChannelPreferences)
- Delivery result types (DeliveryResult, BatchDeliveryResult, channel-specific options)
- Digest types (DigestGroup, DigestEmailContext) for batching notifications
- Scheduling types (SchedulingOptions, ScheduledNotificationJob)
- Webhook types for provider callbacks and internal triggers
- Statistics types for tracking notification metrics
- Push subscription types (PushSubscription, RegisterPushSubscriptionInput)
- Unsubscribe types for CAN-SPAM compliance
- Error types including NotificationError class and NotificationErrorCode enum
All types follow established patterns and support the multi-channel notification system with timezone awareness.

phases.name: Core Notification Service
phases.description: Build the core notification service with template system and scheduling logic

subtasks.title: Create notification templates system
subtasks.description: Build template registry with content templates for each notification type (class_reminder, grade_update, announcement, cancellation)
subtasks.notes:
Successfully created comprehensive template registry system in src/lib/notifications/templates.ts. Implemented:
- Template registry with all 6 notification types (class_reminder, grade_update, announcement, cancellation, assignment_due, exam_reminder)
- Templates for all 4 channels (email, push, SMS, in_app)
- Template rendering engine with variable substitution supporting conditionals (#if, #else if, #else)
- Helper functions for time formatting (formatTimeUntil, formatHoursUntil, formatDaysUntil)
- Template retrieval functions (getTemplate, getTemplatesForType, hasTemplate)
- Template validation for required variables
- Multi-channel rendering support (renderTemplate, renderTemplatesForChannels)
All templates follow consistent patterns with proper variable replacement and support for optional fields.

subtasks.title: Build notification service core
subtasks.description: Create main NotificationService class with methods for creating, scheduling, and dispatching notifications

subtasks.title: Implement timezone-aware scheduling
subtasks.description: Create timezone utilities for scheduling notifications during user's acceptable hours (quiet hours enforcement)

subtasks.title: Build notification preference manager
subtasks.description: Create service for managing user notification preferences with CRUD operations

qa_checklist: Email notifications sent successfully for class reminders
Email notifications sent for grade updates
Push notifications work in supported browsers
Timezone-aware scheduling prevents notifications during quiet hours
All Arabic text renders correctly (RTL support)
Error handling and retry logic works for failed deliveries
